hero.hint: Pay once €5/year • Instant access • No auto-renewal • iDEAL & Bancontact

social_proof.label: Trusted by organisers across the Netherlands

features.title: Everything you need
features.routing_desc: My biggest frustration: guests ending up with the same tablemates three times in a row. The algorithm now automatically ensures everyone meets as many new people as possible — dietary requirements included.
features.envelopes_desc: The best idea I ever had: guests receive a sealed envelope with the next address at each course. The route stays a surprise. Now you can print them with a single click.
features.participants_desc: Who's vegetarian? Who has a nut allergy? Who can't make the main course? I used to forget something every time. Now you record everything per participant — partner included.
features.dragdrop_desc: Sometimes you want to tweak things manually — those two neighbours shouldn't be at the same table, or perhaps the new residents should sit together. Drag guests between tables and see the effect instantly.
features.overview_desc: Every host wants to know: who's coming, and how many? You can send this overview straight away — saves a lot of last-minute messages on the day itself.
features.drinks_desc: The first time I forgot to include the pre-dinner drinks in my plan. Never again: set a central location and the planner automatically factors it into the schedule.

how_it_works.title: Done in 4 steps
how_it_works.subtitle: What used to take me an entire evening now takes half an hour. Four steps, done.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Set up the course structure: which courses are there, who hosts the pre/after-party drinks, and how many guests per table.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Add participants with name, address, dietary requirements and availability. Or import via an Excel template.
how_it_works.step3_desc: The planner automatically calculates the optimal seating arrangement. Afterwards, make manual adjustments via drag & drop if needed.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Print the envelope cards and the overview. Ready to enjoy a successful running dinner!

testimonials.title: What organisers say
testimonials.quote1: "Planning our neighbourhood running dinner used to take an entire evening. Now I'm done in 20 minutes. Fantastic!"
testimonials.quote2: "The envelope cards are a brilliant idea. The surprise of discovering the next address makes the event even more fun."
testimonials.quote3: "Finally a tool that accounts for dietary requirements and allergies. A must-have for any running dinner organiser."

pricing.title: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.subtitle: I didn't want to pay a lot for a tool I only use a few times a year either. So: €5 per year, unlimited planning.
pricing.feature6: ✓ Save participants as a fixed group
pricing.feature7: ✓ Payment via iDEAL, credit card or SEPA
pricing.note: Instant access after payment. Invoice sent by email.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: A running dinner (also known as a progressive dinner or safari supper) is a social event where participants eat each course at a different host's home. That way, everyone meets new people in a relaxed atmosphere.
faq.q2: How many participants can I add?
faq.a2: There is no hard limit. The planner works optimally with 12 to 120 participants, which covers most running dinner events.
faq.a3: The planner uses a smart algorithm that minimises overlap in tablemates. Each participant meets the widest possible variety of fellow guests throughout the evening.
faq.q4: Can I import participants from Excel?
faq.a4: Yes! You can download an Excel template with all columns (name, address, dietary requirements, availability, etc.), fill it in and import it. Saves a lot of time.
faq.q5: How do the envelope cards work?
faq.a5: For each table, a card is printed per course with the next address. Guests may only open the envelope at the end of the course — so the route stays a surprise until the very last moment.
faq.q6: How long is my subscription valid?
faq.a6: Your subscription is valid for 1 year from the payment date. You can easily renew it afterwards.
faq.a7: You can pay via iDEAL, credit card (Visa/Mastercard) or SEPA direct debit. After payment you'll immediately receive an invoice by email.
faq.a8: Your account details (email, password) are stored securely. The participant information you enter in the planner is not stored permanently — that data only lives in your browser session.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.who_text: Running Dinner Planner is a service of VMH BV, based in the Netherlands, reachable via runningdiner.nl. For questions about this policy or your data, use the contact form on the homepage.
privacy.data_account: Account data: email address, password (hashed), language preference, country.
privacy.data_payment: Payment data: processed via Mollie. We only store the invoice number, amount, VAT scheme and a Mollie reference. Card details and bank numbers stay with Mollie.
privacy.data_event: Event data you enter yourself: participant names, addresses, preferences. This stays in your account.
privacy.data_logs: Access logs: IP address, timestamp, user-agent — purely for security, kept 30 days.
privacy.data_analytics: Analytics: self-hosted Plausible, cookieless and anonymised. No Google Analytics.
privacy.purpose_heading: What we use this data for
privacy.purpose_service: Delivering the service (account, planner, invoices via email).
privacy.purpose_invoicing: Invoicing, VAT filing, tax retention obligation (7 years, required).
privacy.purpose_comms: Transactional emails (welcome, invoice, password reset, renewal reminder).
privacy.purpose_improve: Anonymous analytics to improve the service.
privacy.partners_mollie: Mollie B.V. (NL) — payment processing; receives your email and payment data.
privacy.partners_brevo: Brevo (Sendinblue) (FR) — transactional and marketing emails; receives your email and language.
privacy.partners_zoho: Zoho Corporation (US, with SCC/DPA) — accounting; receives your name, email, country, optional VAT-ID and invoice lines.
privacy.partners_hetzner: Hetzner Online GmbH (DE) — hosting of the app and database.
privacy.partners_cloudflare: Cloudflare, Inc. (US, with SCC/DPA) — DNS and CDN.
privacy.rights_intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation you have the right to:
privacy.right_rectify: Rectification — update your email and preferences yourself in your profile.
privacy.right_delete: Deletion — via the red "Delete my account" button. Invoices are kept for 7 years (tax law requirement).
privacy.right_portability: Portability — the data-export button gives you everything in JSON.
privacy.right_complaint: Complaint — with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl).
privacy.retention_account: Account data: as long as your account is active. After deletion: immediately deleted; payment data anonymised.
privacy.retention_invoices: Invoices: 7 years (Dutch tax law, Art. 52 AWR).
privacy.retention_event: Event data: automatically deleted 12 months after the event date, unless you remain active.
privacy.security_text: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt. All traffic goes over TLS. Databases run on Hetzner (Germany) with daily backups and encrypted storage. System access is limited via SSH keys and two-factor authentication.
privacy.changes_text: We update this policy when the service or legislation requires it. Material changes are communicated via email.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.service_text: Running Dinner Planner ("the service") is a SaaS tool for organising running dinners, provided by VMH BV, based in the Netherlands. Using the service implies acceptance of these terms.
terms.account_password: You are responsible for your password.
terms.account_legal: The service may not be used for illegal purposes.
terms.account_data: You remain the owner of the data you enter (participants, addresses, etc.).
terms.price_amount: The subscription costs €5 per year (local equivalent in GBP/USD/CAD/AUD/NZD outside the EU).
terms.price_recurring: Auto-renewal is opt-in. You can switch it off at any time via your profile.
terms.price_refund: No refunds for unused parts of a subscription year, except under statutory cooling-off rights (14 days within the EU, only if unused).
terms.price_vat: Prices in EUR include VAT under the OSS scheme. Invoices are sent immediately by email.
terms.availability_text: We aim for high availability but do not guarantee 100% uptime. Planned maintenance is announced in advance where possible. We are not liable for consequential damages due to unavailability.
terms.liability_text: Our liability is limited to the subscription amounts paid by you in the last 12 months. Indirect damages are excluded. This limitation does not apply in case of intent or gross negligence on our part.
terms.termination_text: You can delete your account at any time via your profile. We may terminate the account in cases of abuse or breach of these terms, with reasonable prior notice except in cases of obvious fraud.
terms.changes_text: We reserve the right to modify these terms. Material changes are communicated by email at least 30 days in advance.
terms.law_text: Dutch law applies to this agreement. Disputes will be submitted to the competent court in the Netherlands.
terms.contact_text: For questions about these terms, please use the contact form on the homepage. Our privacy policy is an integral part of these terms.
